articles.description: Chelsea's Enzo Fernandez will sit out their next two games after he "crossed a line", says manager Liam Rosenior.

articles.description: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says unhappy players can leave the club, but he hopes midfielder Rodri will stay.

articles.description: Andrew Benson analyses what we have learned during the first month of the new F1 rules, and the problems that need to be addressed.
articles.title: F1's new rules: The thorny issues facing the sport over racing, qualifying and safety

articles.description: Mikel Arteta says Arsenal have '"a very good relationship" with most national teams, despite 11 of his players withdrawing from international duty.
articles.title: Arsenal: Mikel Arteta defends 11 players withdrawing from international duty

articles.title: Investec Champions Cup: Northampton 49-41 Castres - Saints reach quarter-final

articles.description: Alexander Isak could feature in Liverpool's FA Cup quarter-final against Manchester City after missing more than three months through injury.
articles.title: Alexander Isak: Liverpool striker could feature against Manchester City on injury return

articles.title: Chisora vs Wilder: The boxing world predicts Saturday's heavyweight contest in London

articles.description: Rayan Cherki caused a social media stir at the Carabao Cup final - and the Manchester City midfielder will hope to steal the show again in Saturday's FA Cup quarter-final against Liverpool.
articles.title: Rayan Cherki: Is Man City star a tamed maverick or a maverick untamed?
